Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: For their season finale, Paul and Ray tackle a remote lake adventure with a precarious beaver dam to navigate. With help from Dan and Ben, the team enjoys a day full of thrilling walleye and bass fishing. The perfect finish? A shore lunch at camp with Outdoor Flavours adding unforgettable flavor to their catch.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Remote Lake Showdown

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace spend the day on Lake Vermilion catching smallmouth bass in the shallows on classic tubes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Shallow Water Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: At Venice, Louisiana, Shaw fishes with renowned captain Mike Frenette for trophy redfish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We saved the best for last. Part three of our Cedros adventure has fantastic fishing for three different species. Big Yellowtail in the morning, Epic calico bass at the famous Chesters rock during the afternoon, and some epic kelp paddy Dorado fishing on the way home.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure, Part Three
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fly in with us to Blackbirch Lake with Gray Wood Outfitter for some non stop action
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A friendly Father and Son challenge, chasing big walleye in Longlac, Ontario, Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Redfish Lodge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman’s Pro Vs Joe Sophomore Jinx1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Putting Okumas new Serrano Series Bass Rods to the test, Shea McIntee heads out with a good friend and local guide, Todd Kline, for an epic day of early winter Bass fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Winter Bass Fishing at Lake Perris
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe- Heads up at Live Oak
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Heads up at Live Oak
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we travel to Ole's Adventure Lodge on the picturesque Whitefish Lake, just west of Thunder Bay, Ontario. In this special episode, we shine a spotlight on the Experience Fishing program, dedicated to introducing the joys of angling to children, new Canadians, and women. Witness the excitement of first-time fishing adventures in a breathtaking setting that inspires connection with nature and community.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Experience Fishing at Ole's Adventure Lodge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lifelong cowboy and Oklahoma native Bill Parker is believed to be the 1st man to reach the shores of Normandy on D-day…June 6th 1944.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On this week's show, we're gonna be talking about some timely fishing techniques for fishing in the heat of summer. It's late July and fishing is very good for a variety of different species all across the Upper Midwest. We're gonna share with you some great tactics for walleye, largemouth bass, smallmouth bass and muskie, with special guests Brian Brosdahl, James Lindner and Jeremy Smith.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Edge - Fishing Techniques for the Dog Days of Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on larry smith the dynamic duo is back for an action packed walleye show out on the bay of green bay
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | EARLY Spring Walleyes Oconto
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The next few episodes are special because the crew heads down to the famous Cedros Island fishing for giant Yellowtail, Dorado, and Calico Bass. This trip is nothing new to us; Shea McIntee and the crew have been fishing at Cedros Island for more than a decade and always stay at Cedros Outdoor Adventurers because of their excellent staff, beautiful resort, and fantastic fishing boats and captains.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: If you want to catch walleye after walleye including big fish too, plan a trip to Q Lake Lodge. Watch Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson catch fish from dawn until dusk, shallow and deep, using a variety of classic walleye presentation options.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Q Lake Lodge Giant Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Larry takes us old-school bobber fishing for hungry bluegills.
Video.title: Bluegills Winnebago

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how to build one of the most effective baits for bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin shows the best spots and baits for bass during the shad spawn.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're returning to one of our all-time favorite destinations in Baja, Mexico - Cedros Island, with Jose and Cedros Outdoor Adventures. People often ask us, 'Why do you return to Cedros Island?' The answer is straightforward: the fishing is absolutely ridiculous almost every single time. Our Stoked on Fishing charter makes a point of showing up in the middle of October for a reason. That reason? It's all about the variety of species available to catch, starting with yellowfin tuna, dorado, halibut, and the elusive Mr. Yellowtail. It's game time - let's go fishing in Baja!
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Cedros Island Goes Off, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Finding Bass on a river can mean covering miles of water
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with B.A.S.S. Elite Angler Bernie Schultz about antique lure collecting and the new season on the bass master Tournament trail.
Video.title: Episode 1
